creator: rajil.s@gmail.com
text:
With a modeswitch it shows up as USB ethernet device,

usb_modeswitch -v 2001 -p a407 -m 1 -M 555342431234567800000000000003f0010300000000000000000000000000 -R 1

Jul  4 19:36:13 nas kernel: cdce0 numa-domain 0 on uhub1
Jul  4 19:36:13 nas kernel: cdce0: <COMcommif> on usbus0
Jul  4 19:36:13 nas kernel: ue0: <USB Ethernet> on cdce0
Jul  4 19:36:13 nas kernel: ue0: Ethernet address: 02:00:ff:aa:aa:aa

# usbconfig -d 0.5 dump_device_desc
ugen0.5: <D-Link,Inc D-Link DWM-157> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (500mA)

  bLength = 0x0012 
  bDescriptorType = 0x0001 
  bcdUSB = 0x0200 
  bDeviceClass = 0x0002  <Communication device>
  bDeviceSubClass = 0x0000 
  bDeviceProtocol = 0x0000 
  bMaxPacketSize0 = 0x0040 
  idVendor = 0x2001 
  idProduct = 0x7d0e 
  bcdDevice = 0x0300 
  iManufacturer = 0x000a  <D-Link,Inc  >
  iProduct = 0x000b  <D-Link DWM-157>
  iSerialNumber = 0x0000  <no string>
  bNumConfigurations = 0x0001
